_meta.description: Field definitions for BESS Sizing Tool tooltips

required_power_mw.name: Required Power @POI
required_power_mw.description: Contracted active power output at Point of Interconnection

required_energy_mwh.name: Required Energy @POI
required_energy_mwh.description: Contracted energy capacity at Point of Interconnection

project_life.name: Project Life
project_life.description: Total project operational lifetime for retention curve calculation

power_factor.name: Power Factor
power_factor.description: Ratio of active power to apparent power at POI

oversizing_year.name: Oversizing Year
oversizing_year.description: Target year at which Disch.@POI must still meet Required Energy. Initial link count is optimized to satisfy this.
oversizing_year.formula: Optimizer increases links until Disch.@POI(year N) >= Required Energy

link_override.name: Link Override
link_override.description: Manual override for initial LINK count. When set, skips auto-calculation. Leave blank for automatic sizing.
link_override.formula: Manual input (optional). Auto = ceil(req_energy / (nameplate × loss × eff)) rounded to links_per_pcs

aux_power_source.name: Aux Power Source
aux_power_source.description: Where auxiliary power is drawn from. 'Battery' means aux load is subtracted from dischargeable energy, increasing required LINKs.

dc_cabling.name: DC Cabling Efficiency
dc_cabling.description: Power loss in DC cables between battery rack and PCS

pcs_efficiency.name: PCS Efficiency
pcs_efficiency.description: Power Conversion System efficiency (DC to AC conversion)

lv_cabling.name: LV Cable Efficiency
lv_cabling.description: Power loss in low-voltage cables between PCS and MV transformer

mv_ac_cabling.name: MV AC Cabling Efficiency
mv_ac_cabling.description: Power loss in MV AC cables between MV transformer and HV transformer

hv_ac_cabling.name: HV AC Cabling Efficiency
hv_ac_cabling.description: Power loss in HV AC cables to Point of Interconnection

applied_dod.name: Applied Depth of Discharge
applied_dod.description: Usable portion of total battery capacity

loss_factors.name: Battery Loss Factors
loss_factors.description: Combined battery-internal losses (cell variation, wiring, contactors)

mbms_consumption.name: MBMS Consumption
mbms_consumption.description: Module Battery Management System parasitic consumption

total_battery_loss_factor.name: Total Battery Loss Factor
total_battery_loss_factor.description: Combined battery-side losses before energy leaves the DC terminal

branching_point.name: Aux Branching Point
branching_point.description: Where auxiliary power branches off from the main power path (MV or HV side)

total_dc_to_aux_eff.name: DC-to-AUX Efficiency
total_dc_to_aux_eff.description: Total efficiency from battery DC terminal to auxiliary load point
total_dc_to_aux_eff.formula:
MV: dc_cabling × pcs × lv_cabling × mv_tr × mv_ac × aux_tr
HV: adds hv_transformer

no_of_pcs.name: Number of PCS
no_of_pcs.description: Total Power Conversion System units required

no_of_links.name: Number of LINKs
no_of_links.description: Total battery LINK modules. Each LINK is the smallest deployable battery unit.

links_per_pcs.name: LINKs per PCS
links_per_pcs.description: Number of battery LINKs connected to each PCS unit
links_per_pcs.formula: Determined by PCS configuration (e.g. 2 for M10+JF3)

no_of_mvt.name: Number of MV Transformers
no_of_mvt.formula: Depends on PCS grouping and power rating

dischargeable_energy_poi_mwh.name: Dischargeable Energy @POI
dischargeable_energy_poi_mwh.description: Actual deliverable energy at Point of Interconnection after all losses
dischargeable_energy_poi_mwh.formula:
disc_mv × mv_to_poi_eff
disc_mv = disc_dc_aux × bat_to_mv_eff
disc_dc_aux = (total_energy × loss_factor) - (aux_load / dc_to_aux_eff)

duration_bol_hr.name: Duration @BOL
duration_bol_hr.description: Discharge duration at Beginning of Life (before any degradation)

cp_rate.name: CP Rate
cp_rate.description: C/P Rate — ratio of required power to installed DC energy. Determines retention curve lookup.

total_bat_poi_eff.name: Battery-to-POI Efficiency
total_bat_poi_eff.description: Total system efficiency from battery DC terminal to POI
total_bat_poi_eff.formula: dc_cabling × pcs × lv_cabling × mv_tr × mv_ac × hv_tr × hv_ac (7 stages)

total_efficiency.name: Total Efficiency
total_efficiency.description: Combined battery loss and system efficiency

system_rte.name: System RTE
system_rte.description: Round-Trip Efficiency — ratio of energy out to energy in for full charge-discharge cycle

retention_pct.name: Retention
retention_pct.description: Remaining battery capacity as percentage of original nameplate
retention_pct.formula: Lookup from retention curve based on CP rate, product type, and year

total_energy_mwh.name: Total Energy
total_energy_mwh.description: Remaining DC energy after degradation (before any losses)

power_oversizing.name: Power Oversizing
power_oversizing.description: Excess installed power above the requirement

energy_oversizing.name: Energy Oversizing
energy_oversizing.description: Excess dischargeable energy above the requirement

soc_high.name: SOC High
soc_high.description: Upper SOC limit during charging cycle
soc_high.formula: Based on product spec and cycle configuration

soc_low.name: SOC Low
soc_low.description: Lower SOC limit during discharging cycle
soc_low.formula: Based on product spec and cycle configuration

rest_soc.name: Rest SOC
rest_soc.description: Battery state of charge during idle/standby periods

cycle_per_day.name: Cycles per Day
cycle_per_day.description: Number of full charge-discharge cycles per day

avg_soc.name: Average SOC
avg_soc.description: Time-weighted average SOC over 24 hours including cycle and rest periods
avg_soc.formula:
(cycle_mid × duty_hours + rest_soc × rest_hours) / 24
cycle_mid = (soc_min + soc_max) / 2
duty_hours = charge_hr + discharge_hr
rest_hours = 24 - duty_hours

apparent_power.name: Apparent Power @POI
apparent_power.description: Total apparent power at POI including reactive component

grid_kvar.name: Grid kVAR
grid_kvar.description: Reactive power exchanged with the grid

temperature_c.name: Design Temperature
temperature_c.description: Ambient temperature for PCS derating calculation. Higher temperatures reduce PCS output capacity.
temperature_c.formula: PCS derating applied above 25°C per manufacturer curve
